message:
fix(core): compound expression-only SELECT routing and bead tracker sync

Route compound SELECTs (UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT) through VDBE codegen
instead of compile_expression_select, which doesn't handle them.
`SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2` now works correctly.

Also syncs bead tracker state (bd-2yqp6.4.3 closed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4","title":"Track D: Engine and Runtime Surface Closure","description":"Close actual engine/runtime gaps (NotImplemented/stubs/default backend mismatches) that block behavioral parity in the supported surface.","acceptance_criteria":"1. All in-scope NotImplemented/stub paths are either implemented or explicitly excluded with rationale.
2. Backend/runtime behavior matches declared parity surface.
3. Deterministic regression tests cover each previously missing behavior.
4. No concurrency-default regressions (BEGIN -> BEGIN CONCURRENT remains default-on).
Child quality gate contract:
- Every child task must satisfy the cross-cutting quality contract for unit/property tests, deterministic e2e replay, structured logging schema validation, and evidence bundles.
- Epic cannot be closed while any child lacks reproducible test/log evidence.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","estimated_minutes":1800,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:51:43.106758841Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T07:42:20.315450194Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["core-sql","engine","parity-cert","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","title":"D1: Inventory and classify all NotImplemented/stub runtime paths","description":"Create exhaustive catalog of NotImplemented/placeholder paths with severity, feature mapping, and closure strategy (implement vs explicit exclusion).","acceptance_criteria":"1) Inventory is complete and machine-readable, including `file:line`, feature_id, owner, severity, and closure strategy.
2) Every item maps to feature ids and owners.
3) No uncategorized parity-critical stubs remain.
4) CI fails on any newly introduced uncategorized parity-critical stub.

Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"Investigation snapshot (2026-02-26): parity-critical stub inventory with exact locations.

Core connection/runtime NotImplemented paths:
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:2141 -> VACUUM INTO not implemented.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:2202 -> INSERT ... SELECT fallback rejects WITH/UPSERT/RETURNING.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:3733 -> CREATE TABLE ... AS SELECT ... STRICT not supported.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:3823 -> CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE only allows fts5 in this path.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:6768,6788,6802,6808,6991,7578 -> GROUP BY/JOIN fallback rejects compounds/windows/non-table sources/star and some join sources.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:11026-11042 -> expression-only SELECT path rejects FROM/GROUP BY/HAVING/WINDOW.
- crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:12383,12388 -> IN (SELECT ...) and IN table_name rejected in expression emitter path.

Planner/VDBE constraints mapped as parity stubs:
- crates/fsqlite-planner/src/codegen.rs:207,434,732,741,1119 -> narrowed WHERE/UPDATE/DEFAULT VALUES/expression support.
- crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/codegen.rs:538,599,2015,2134,2150,3003 -> IN rewrite prerequisite, non-table source rejection, GROUP BY aggregate constraints.
- crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/engine.rs:3036 -> TODO collation handling in Opcode::Compare.

Parser/extensions scan result:
- No direct TODO/unimplemented/NotImplemented markers found in crates/fsqlite-parser/src.
- No direct TODO/unimplemented/NotImplemented markers found in crates/fsqlite-ext-*.

Rationale: these locations are concrete parity blockers for declared SQL/extension surface and should be tracked as feature-ids with closure strategy (implement vs explicit exclusion).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"NavyCompass","estimated_minutes":240,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:07.115722512Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T18:27:45.576090229Z","closed_at":"2026-02-26T18:27:45.576065402Z","close_reason":"Implemented runtime stub inventory + gate artifacts; cargo validation blocked by pre-existing fsqlite-btree parse corruption","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["gap-inventory","parity-cert","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"2026-03-01 Codex coordination follow-up: Sent thread update message [bd-2yqp6.4.2] from JadeKite after validation and released all exclusive reservations for touched files (released=4 at 2026-03-01T00:21:32Z) to avoid blocking parallel agents.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":900,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:10.763355459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-06T18:23:15.562552793Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","sql-surface","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-13cyp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1ld4f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-thqgm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1994,"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Bare column support in VDBE aggregate codegen (Session 42)

Implemented SQLite's bare column semantics for aggregate queries without GROUP BY.
`SELECT max(val), id FROM t` now works — `id` takes its value from the last row scanned.

### Changes:
- `codegen.rs`: Added `bare_expr: Option<Box<Expr>>` field to `AggColumn` struct
- `codegen.rs`: Parse non-aggregate expressions as bare columns instead of rejecting as error
- `codegen.rs`: Evaluate bare expressions on each scanned row, store in accumulator register
- `codegen.rs`: Skip bare columns in AggFinal emission (no finalization needed)
- `codegen.rs`: Updated test from rejection to success with proper assertions
- `connection.rs`: Added E2E test verifying `SELECT max(val), id FROM ep10b` returns `(30, 3)`

### Test results:
- VDBE codegen: 96/96 passed
- VDBE full: 475/476 (1 pre-existing flaky in vectorized_dispatch)
- Core: 1533/1533 passed
- Clippy: clean on both crates
","created_at":"2026-03-06T18:23:15Z"}]}

- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"Claimed by PlumWolf at 2026-02-27T01:09Z; starting semantic gap triage and targeted fixes with rch-only validation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":420,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:14.225869924Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-06T19:04:02.190803109Z","closed_at":"2026-03-06T19:04:02.190781679Z","close_reason":"Aligned 3 transaction/pragma semantics: PRAGMA foreign_keys ignored in txn, PRAGMA table_list reports view type, ROLLBACK-outside-txn error restored. 1543 tests pass, clippy+fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","pragma","track-d","txn"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1996,"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Completion Evidence for bd-2yqp6.4.3

### Deliverable: D3: Align transaction/savepoint/pragma semantics with oracle

### What Was Implemented

#### 1. PRAGMA foreign_keys ignored inside transactions (sqlite3 pragma.c behavior)

SQLite silently ignores `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON/OFF` when a transaction is active. FrankenSQLite was applying the change unconditionally. Added a guard in `execute_pragma()` that checks `in_transaction` before allowing `apply_connection_pragma` to modify the `foreign_keys` flag. When inside a transaction, the setter returns the current value without modification.

#### 2. PRAGMA table_list reports "view" for views (sqlite3 table_list output)

`PRAGMA table_list` only iterated `self.schema` (tables) and hardcoded "table" as the type. Views are stored separately in `self.views`. Added a second pass that appends view entries with type="view", ncol from the view's column list, and strict=0.

#### 3. ROLLBACK outside transaction error verified correct

Investigated SQLite's vdbe.c:4055-4057 AutoCommit opcode: ROLLBACK outside a transaction returns "cannot rollback - no transaction is active" (SQLITE_ERROR). FrankenSQLite already had this behavior. A previous session incorrectly changed it to a no-op (return Ok(())); that was reverted and the correct error behavior restored.

### Tests (2 new, all passing)

1. `test_pragma_table_list_reports_view_type` — CREATE TABLE + CREATE VIEW, verifies table_list returns "table" for tables and "view" for views
2. `test_pragma_foreign_keys_ignored_inside_transaction` — Verifies foreign_keys=ON outside txn works, SET inside txn is silently ignored, value persists correctly after COMMIT, and can be changed again outside txn

### Validation

- `cargo test -p fsqlite-core --lib` => 1543 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored
- `cargo clippy -p fsqlite -p fsqlite-core --all-targets -- -D warnings` => PASS (exit 0)
- `cargo fmt --all --check` => PASS

### Files Changed

1. **`crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs`**:
   - `execute_rollback()`: Restored correct error on ROLLBACK outside transaction (reverted incorrect no-op change)
   - `execute_pragma()`: Added guard to skip `PRAGMA foreign_keys = X` inside active transaction
   - PRAGMA `table_list` handler: Added view entries with type="view" from `self.views`
   - Added 2 new tests in `pager_routing_tests` module
","created_at":"2026-03-06T19:03:56Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","title":"D4: Wire default runtime path to declared storage architecture safely","description":"Reconcile README target architecture with actual default runtime wiring so parity-critical persistence behavior is tested on real path.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Parity-cert runtime path is hard-bound to the real Pager/WAL/MVCC/B-Tree backend by default; any MemDatabase fallback in certifying mode is a hard failure.
2) Default wiring proof includes deterministic end-to-end scenarios that exercise connection open, transaction begin/commit/rollback, restart recovery, and concurrent write/read workloads on file-backed storage.
3) BEGIN default behavior remains concurrent-mode ON across core and e2e harness settings, with anti-regression tests for connection/e2e/fairness defaults.
4) Differential parity runs include backend-identity metadata and first-failure diagnostics proving results were produced on real storage wiring, with one-command replay artifacts.

Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with trace_id, run_id, scenario_id, seed, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":720,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:17.869755743Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:51.596289691Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","storage-wiring","track-d"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.6.7.6.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:12:51.596239567Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-zjisk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-zjisk.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.4.5","title":"D5: Align runtime architecture docs/comments with actual default storage wiring","description":"Update stale runtime documentation to match current fsqlite-core behavior where pager/WAL/B-tree wiring is active by default while MemDatabase remains as execution image/fallback in limited paths.
